name: AdversaryIndex
description: Live AI adversarial threat index. Attack success rates, defense efficacy, and compliance risk scores across foundation models, updated hourly. Sources include NVD/CVE, MITRE ATLAS, AI Incident Database, and OWASP LLM Top 10.
rai:dataCollection: Threat data sourced from NVD/CVE (NIST), MITRE ATLAS, AI Incident Database (Partnership on AI), and OWASP LLM Top 10. All public sources.
rai:dataBiases: Coverage weighted toward publicly disclosed vulnerabilities. Unreported threats not captured. Attack success rates are estimates based on published research.
rai:dataLimitations: Only publicly disclosed vulnerabilities and incidents are tracked
Attack success rates based on published research may not reflect real-world conditions
Defense efficacy scores are aggregated estimates
EU AI Act risk classifications are interpretive

distribution.name: AdversaryIndex Latest CSV
distribution.description: Full threat dataset in CSV format, updated hourly

distribution.name: AdversaryIndex Latest JSON
distribution.description: Full threat dataset in JSON format, updated hourly

distribution.name: Documentation
distribution.description: Primary dataset documentation with schema, methodology, and usage instructions
